subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the divine light! In the glorious Qur'án He saith: "They desire to extinguish the light of God with their mouths" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستضای از نور الهی در قرآن مجید میفرماید یریدون ان یطفئوا نورالله بافواههم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @growth of the Cause
